DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Mar-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO PLANNING DEPARTMENT, A DEPARTMENT OF, SAN FRANCISCO ZONING ADMINISTRATOR, DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 302 PER JUDGE BUSCH RECUSAL. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189

Hearing On Respondents City And County Of San Francisco, San Francisco Planning Department, And San Francisco Zoning Administrator'S Demurrer To Petition For Writ Of Mandate/Prohibition/Certification
Off Calendar Mar-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO PLANNING DEPARTMENT AND SAN FRANCISCO ZONING ADMINISTRATOR'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/PROHIBITION/CERTIFICATION TRANSFERRED FROM DEPARTMENT 301 PER JUDGE BUSCH'S RECUSAL.
APPEARANCES: JUSTIN L. ALLAMANO, ESQUIRE (LUCE FORWARD, 415.356.4664) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. CHRISTINE VAN AKEN, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY (415.554.4721) APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS, GOVERNMENT CODE 65009 CONTROLS. HONIG ESTABLISHES THAT PLAINTIFF CANNOT ESTABLISH ESTOPPEL. PLAINTIFF, REPRESENTED BY COUNSEL, CANNOT INVOKE ESTOPPEL BASED ON A CITY EMPLOYEE'S STATEMENT OF THE LAW. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM/PM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

Hearing On Respondents City And County Of San Francisco; San Francisco Planning Department; San Francisco Zoning Administrator'S Demurrer To Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Jan-09-2007 Text Ruling

APPEARANCES: JUSTIN L. ALLAMANO, ESQUIRE (LUCE FORWARD, 415.356.4664) APPEARING FOR PETITIONER. CHRISTINE VAN AKEN, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY (415.554.3875) APPEARING FOR RESPONDENT

DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Jan-09-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted it's tentative ruling as follows: RESPONDENTS SAN FRANCISCO PLANNING DEPARTMENT and SAN FRANCISCO ZONING ADMINISTRATOR'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/CERTIFICATION is transferred to Department 302 to be heard on January 9, 2007 per the recusal of Judge Busch. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
